functions.name: endToEnd
functions.description:
args.user_id will be used in the header for all function calls. 
chats = chat-service.getChats(). 
cur_chat = random chat if len(chats) else chat-service.createChat()
messages = chat-service.getMessagesForChat(cur_chat)
loop {
content = lower case letters from 1 to 100 characters long.
messages.append[{role: user, content}]
assistant_content = stream chat-service.createMessage(chat_id: cur_chat.id, content)
messages.append[{role: assistant, content: assistant_content}]
wait(min(len(assistant_content) * 0.1, 10))
decide if the user should create a new chat, stay on same chat, or go to previous chat (more messages in current conversation the more likely to switch; if switching then more likely to create a new chat if less chats; if new chat then clear messages)
}
